debug_info.goal:
Smooth1 : (ℝ → ℝ) → ℝ → ℝ → ℝ
SmoothingF : ℝ → ℝ
c₁ : ℝ
c₁_pos : 0 < c₁
c₁_lt : c₁ < 1
hc₁ : ∀ (ε x : ℝ), 0 < ε → 0 < x → x ≤ 1 - c₁ * ε → Smooth1 SmoothingF ε x = 1
c₂ : ℝ
c₂_pos : 0 < c₂
c₂_lt : c₂ < 1
hc₂ : ∀ (ε x : ℝ), ε ∈ Ioo 0 1 → 1 + c₂ * ε ≤ x → Smooth1 SmoothingF ε x = 0
C_gt' : 3 < c₁ + c₂ + 3
C : ℝ
C_eq : C = 2 * (c₁ + c₂ + 3)
C_gt : 3 < C
X : ℝ
X_ge_C : C < X
ε : ℝ
εpos : 0 < ε
ε_lt_one : ε < 1
this_1 : 0 < X
X_ne_zero : X ≠ 0
n_on_X_pos : ∀ {n : ℕ}, 0 < n → 0 < ↑n / X
smooth1BddAbove : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < n → Smooth1 SmoothingF ε (↑n / X) ≤ 1
smooth1BddBelow : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < n → Smooth1 SmoothingF ε (↑n / X) ≥ 0
smoothIs1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < n → ↑n ≤ X * (1 - c₁ * ε) → Smooth1 SmoothingF ε (↑n / X) = 1
smoothIs0 : ∀ (n : ℕ), 1 + c₂ * ε ≤ ↑n / X → Smooth1 SmoothingF ε (↑n / X) = 0
F : ℝ → ℝ := Smooth1 SmoothingF ε
n₀ : ℕ := ⌊X * (1 - c₁ * ε)⌋₊
n₀_le : ↑n₀ ≤ X * (1 - c₁ * ε)
n₀_gt : X * (1 - c₁ * ε) - 1 ≤ ↑n₀
sumΛ : Summable fun n => vonMangoldt n * F (↑n / X)
sumΛn₀ : ∀ (n₀ : ℕ), Summable fun n => vonMangoldt (n + n₀) * F ((↑n + ↑n₀) / X)
n₁ : ℕ := ⌈X * (1 + c₂ * ε)⌉₊
n₁_ge : X * (1 + c₂ * ε) ≤ ↑n₁
n₁_le : ↑n₁ < X * (1 + c₂ * ε) + 1
n₁_ge_n₀ : n₀ ≤ n₁
n₁_sub_n₀ : ↑n₁ - ↑n₀ < X * ε * (c₂ + c₁) + 2
⊢ ∀ n ∈ Finset.range (n₁ - n₀), ‖vonMangoldt (n + n₀)‖ ≤ Real.log (X * (1 + c₂ * ε))
